overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dense forest at night, illuminated by a flashlight beam. The footage appears to be from a survival or horror video game, featuring a narrow dirt trail winding through tall trees and thick undergrowth with atmospheric low-light rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail illuminated by flashlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow forest path, sweeping the flashlight across the trail to navigate through the dense woodland

entered.detail: narrow winding trail of packed earth cutting through the forest floor
tall coniferous trees forming a dense canopy overhead, blocking sky visibility
thick shrubs and ferns lining both sides of the trail
boulder partially visible among the vegetation on the right side of the path
thick tree trunk standing close to the path edge on the right

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest at night. A flashlight illuminates the path ahead, revealing tall pine trees, thick undergrowth, and occasional rocks. The environment is completely devoid of other people or vehicles, creating an isolated and atmospheric woodland setting typical of survival game environments.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dense, isolated forest at night, maintaining a claustrophobic and atmospheric mood. It begins by tracking steadily along a narrow dirt trail, where a single flashlight beam cuts through the darkness to reveal the immediate path. As the camera advances, the light flickers across tall pine trees and thick undergrowth that crowd the edges of the trail. The scene then deepens into the woodland interior, passing occasional rocks and tangled brush while the surrounding void remains completely empty of other people or vehicles.
